## What was built

### 1. `packages/shared/src/themes.ts` *(new)*
The canonical theme definition, kept schema-only per the package's role:
- **`ThemeColors`** interface — `background`, `foreground`, `accent`, `sidebar`, `editor`, `terminal`, `statusBar`
- **`Theme`** interface — adds `id`, `name`, `colors`, `fontFamily`, `fontSize`, `dark`
- **3 built-in themes:**
  - `t3-dark` — near-black dark theme matching the app's existing dark palette (default)
  - `t3-light` — clean white light theme matching the existing light palette
  - `t3-midnight` — deep navy + sky-blue accent, a custom dark variant
- **`getTheme(id)`** and **`listThemes()`** exported utilities

### 2. `packages/shared/package.json` *(edited)*
Added `"./themes"` subpath export so the web app can import as `@t3tools/shared/themes`.

### 3. `apps/web/src/hooks/useColorTheme.ts` *(new)*
Follows the exact same external-store pattern as the existing `useTheme.ts`:
- Reads/writes `t3code:color-theme` in `localStorage`
- Applies **CSS custom properties** (`--ct-background`, `--ct-foreground`, `--ct-accent`, `--ct-sidebar`, `--ct-editor`, `--ct-terminal`, `--ct-status-bar`, `--ct-font-family`, `--ct-font-size`) to `document.documentElement` on module load (flash-free) and on every change
- Cross-tab sync via `StorageEvent`
- Exposes `{ theme, setTheme, availableThemes }` via `useSyncExternalStore`

### 4. `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` *(new)*
A grid of radio-button–style theme cards, each with:
- A **mini editor layout preview** (sidebar strip + editor area with fake code lines + status bar strip) rendered via inline styles from the theme's raw color values
- **Color swatches** (bg, fg, accent, sidebar dots)
- An "Active" badge on the selected theme
- Full keyboard/ARIA accessibility (`role="radiogroup"`, `role="radio"`, `aria-checked`)

### 5. `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` *(edited)*
Added a **Color theme** sub-section inside the existing Appearance card, below the light/dark/system radio group. The two controls are complementary: light/dark controls the OS-mode preference while color themes add distinct palettes.

### 6. `apps/web/src/index.css` *(edited)*
- Added `:root` defaults for all `--ct-*` variables (so the CSS is self-documenting and SSR-safe)
- Changed `body { font-family }` and `font-size` to consume `var(--ct-font-family)` / `var(--ct-font-size)` — theme font changes take effect immediately without a React re-render
